commit.message:
Rewrite accordion with proven Prompts-pattern event delegation

- Replaced button-based accordion with div[role=button] (Prompts pattern)
- Event delegation via document.addEventListener (works for dynamic DOM)
- Arrow text toggle (▸/▾) instead of CSS transform
- Keyboard support (Enter/Space) via separate keydown handler
- Removed stats counter, how-it-works, GitHub browse link
- Back-nav moved to bottom
- Smaller gray disclaimer

commit.message:
Enhance audit ingestion and findings management

- Added new synthesized run entries in `index.json` to track additional audit runs.
- Updated `ingest_synthesizer.py` to include status normalization and validation checks for findings.
- Enhanced `open_findings.json` to reflect the latest findings and their statuses, including detailed history and proof hooks.
- Updated `linear_sync.json` to synchronize with Linear issues and prevent duplicate entries.
- Regenerated case files for all findings during ingestion, ensuring consistency with the latest data.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test: add 27 admin/webhook/lifecycle integration tests (110 total)

test_admin_and_templates.py (13 tests):
- Prompt template CRUD: create, list, get, update, delete, 404, auth
- Admin user management: list users, auth required, session revocation
- Session management: list sessions, revoke session, auth required

test_webhook_and_lifecycle.py (14 tests):
- Generic prompt handling: 'start', 'implement this' expand with issue context
- Specific prompt preservation
- Event filtering: pipeline, issue, merge_request events ignored
- Runtime config: get, patch, delete, auth required
- MR comment webhook requires prior task
- Task state transitions through multiple states
- Completed task timestamps verification
- Logout invalidates session

commit.message:
Fix/data model alignment (#14)

* fix: align types, constants, and API service with new data model

- ItemStatus: replace 'claimed'/'collected' with 'reserved'/'released'
- Claim: remove deprecated user_id/customer_name/customer_email/payment_id/user fields
  add claimant_id, claimant (ClaimantSummary), active_transaction_id,
  collection_mode, delivery_tracking_info, closed fields
- ClaimStatus: remove 'collected'
- PaymentStatus: replace pending/completed/failed with not_required/awaiting_payment/paid
- CLAIM_STATUSES/PAYMENT_STATUSES/ITEM_STATUSES/COLLECTED_STATUSES: updated to match
- api.ts markCollected: collection_method -> collection_mode

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: update UI components to use new data model

- claims/page: remove 'collected' ClaimStatus cases, claim.user -> claim.claimant
- items/page: 'claimed' item status -> 'reserved', update filter options and labels
- dashboard/page: 'claimedItems' -> 'reservedItems', fix collected activity check
  to use collected_at presence instead of deprecated 'collected' status
- ItemModal: 'claimed' status case -> 'reserved', remove bare 'collected' case

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: replace claim.user with claim.claimant in claims page

Map deprecated User relation fields to ClaimantSummary:
- user.first_name/last_name → claimant.full_name
- user.email → claimant.email
- user.phone_number → claimant.phone

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove deprecated WorkflowState and dead constants

WorkflowState was removed from the data model. Drop the import and
the unused WORKFLOW_STATES / WORKFLOW_STATE_LABELS exports from
constants/claims.ts. Also stage the MonthlyTrend removal from dashboard.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: manifest-driven AI kit integration + project-tooling model (#3)

* feat: manifest-driven AI kit integration + project-tooling model

- Add generic linker: .specify/scripts/bash/link-ai-integration.sh
  - Reads project-tooling.json to honor spec_workflow: false
  - Skips speckit.* assets when spec_workflow is disabled
  - Writes/merges project-tooling.json after linking

- Add project-tooling.json generation in install.sh (step 5)
  - Seeds spec_workflow: true, ai_tool: null for consumer declaration

- Bundle .specify/extensions/* and .specify/integrations/copilot/scripts
  - Copilot integration adapter scripts tracked as source content
  - Integration install receipts (*.manifest.json) gitignored

- Add docs/integrations.md documenting ai-kit.manifest.json contract,
  project-tooling.json schema, and separation model

- Remove root README.md (docs/ is the docs root for this repo)
- Remove extensions/manifest.json, presets/personal.json (unused)
- Update docs/README.md, docs/extensions.md, docs/CONTRIBUTING.md
- Update .gitignore: ignore integrations/*.manifest.json

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove github-actions dependabot config (no workflows exist)

Dependabot was failing with dependency_file_not_found because no
.github/workflows/*.yml files exist in speckit-core. Clear the
updates list until workflows are added.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove dependabot.yml (no dependencies to track)

An empty updates array is invalid per the dependabot schema.
speckit-core has no package ecosystem to update, so remove
the file entirely.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Phase 1: SEC filings tool, macro regime agent, earnings interpreter (#33)

* Phase 1: SEC filings tool, macro regime agent, earnings interpreter

SEC filings MCP tool (sec-filings.ts):
- Ticker-to-CIK resolution via SEC company_tickers.json
- EDGAR submissions API for filing listing
- Full filing text fetch with HTML stripping
- Section extraction (risk-factors, mda, business, financials, legal)

Macro regime agent (macro_regime.py):
- FRED economic indicator fetching (GDP, UNRATE, CPI, etc.)
- Period-over-period change calc with Decimal arithmetic
- Regime classification (EXPANSION/CONTRACTION/TRANSITION)
- Dashboard formatting with indicator readings

Earnings interpreter agent (earnings_interpreter.py):
- Sentiment scoring with earnings-tuned lexicons
- Transcript splitting (prepared remarks vs Q&A)
- Tone shift detection between sections
- Guidance extraction and classification (raised/lowered/maintained)
- Management confidence via hedging ratio

Also updates copilot instructions with issue-first workflow requirement.

Closes #30, Closes #31, Closes #32

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Switch build backend from setuptools to hatchling

setuptools >=82 requires PEP 660 support that older pip versions
lack. hatchling has native editable install support across all
pip versions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update README and copilot instructions for Python venv workflow

Ubuntu 24.04 enforces PEP 668 — system Python packages are
externally managed. All Python work requires a venv.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix pytest failures and ruff lint errors

- Fix guidance regex to handle words between 'raising' and 'guidance'
- Remove extraneous f-string prefixes and unused imports
- Wrap long lines under 100 chars (source + tests)
- Add _reading() helper in tests to reduce IndicatorReading boilerplate

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Add .specify/ai-kit.manifest.json declaring owned paths and linking modes:
  - link_children for .github/agents (skips speckit.* if .speckit absent)
  - link_dir for .github/prompts, .github/skills, .github/hooks
  - if_missing copy for .github/copilot-instructions.md

- Update install.sh:
  - Generic linker path delegates to link-ai-integration.sh when available
    (linker writes project-tooling.json automatically)
  - Standalone path adds Step 5: write/merge project-tooling.json
    (preserves spec_workflow, sets ai_tool: 'copilot', ai_kit_path: '.copilot')

feat: implement CLASS tab — talents, class features, background, deity, notes (sd-3pk)

- Class name + level inputs that persist to localStorage
- Talents section: 5 rows with level badges (Lvl 2/4/6/8/10), earned/locked
  state, text inputs and clear buttons; auto-enables as level increases
- Class features section (collapsible): static feature text for Fighter,
  Thief, Wizard, Priest; free-text notes textarea for other classes
- Background and Notes/Backstory textareas with auto-grow on content

commit.message:
fix: use TextEncoder for empty file SHA-256 test (cross-realm fix)

jsdom creates ArrayBuffer in its own realm, which Node's
crypto.subtle.digest rejects on Linux. Using TextEncoder.encode('')
produces a native-realm buffer that works cross-platform.

commit.message:
docs: document AWS Graviton ARM64 boot loop root cause

CHR ARM64 kernel 5.6.3 does NOT boot on AWS Graviton (Graviton2 t4g.small).

Root cause (confirmed from GetConsoleOutput diagnostics):
- Console shows a repeating boot loop:
    EFI stub: Booting Linux Kernel...
    EFI stub: Generating empty DTB    <- red flag
    EFI stub: Exiting boot services...
    UEFI firmware ... (machine resets back to UEFI)
- 'Generating empty DTB' = UEFI didn't supply an FDT; EFI stub creates
  an empty one as fallback
- AWS Graviton Nitro uses ACPI (not Device Tree) for hardware discovery
- CHR ARM64 kernel 5.6.3 (2020) crashes at earliest hardware init when
  given an empty DTB and/or can't process Nitro ACPI tables
- No kernel messages ever appear; Nitro hypervisor resets → loop forever

Consequence: extra-nic.npk ENA injection is correct in theory but the
ENA question is unreachable until MikroTik ships a CHR ARM64 kernel with
proper AWS Nitro ACPI support.

Updated DESIGN.md with full finding and diagnosis.
Updated BACKLOG.md with AWS Graviton tracking item + x86 baseline test idea.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: Deploy MikroTik RouterOS CHR on cloud providers (OCI + AWS) via serial console provisioning

commit.message:
WP01-T04: Executor base del Delivery Loop (Control Plane) (#24)

* Initial plan

* feat(control-plane): WP01-T04 implement executor base for the Delivery Loop

- Add backend/control_plane/executor.py with:
  - create_run_for_task (EX-01): QUEUED task → CREATED run + EXECUTING
  - assign_run (EX-02): CREATED → ASSIGNED with agent_id
  - mark_run_running (EX-03): ASSIGNED → RUNNING with started_at
  - close_run (EX-04): terminal outcomes SUCCEEDED/FAILED/TIMED_OUT/CANCELLED
  - apply_run_outcome_to_task (EX-05): propagates run result to parent task
  - InvalidTransitionError and TaskNotFoundError exceptions
  - Retry logic via retry_policy.max_execution_retries (default 3)
- Add backend/tests/test_control_plane_executor.py with 48 unit tests

All 128 tests pass (48 new + 80 existing).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: emit whispers from Daemon.poll_once() on state changes

The Daemon class (used by the web app's embedded monitor) was detecting
state changes and emitting events to the event_bus, but never emitting
whispers. Whisper emission was only in Monitor.poll_node() which is not
used by the web app.

- Import and call get_whisper_stream() in Daemon.poll_once() on state
  changes, mirroring monitor.py logic (pin for waiting/error, whisper
  for others)
- Add catch-all exception handler in run_embedded() so the background
  task doesn't die silently

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct Gemini CLI install method

Gemini CLI has no --system-instructions flag.
Correct mechanism: ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md is auto-loaded on every session.

Changes:
- install_gemini(): store to ~/.gemini/personas/<slug>.md
- New activate_gemini_persona(): ask user which to copy to GEMINI.md
- Fix research path: references/research/ (was research/)
- Update platform label and usage hints in install.sh
- Update README platform table and install demo
- Update CONTRIBUTING.md platform table

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
